summary: Completed frontend testing for 3DKPRINT website. Successfully verified menu navigation, portfolio empty state, and Mercado Pago integration setup. All required features are implemented and working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Cart state doesn't persist when navigating directly to /checkout URL. Items added to localStorage are not being picked up by React cart context on direct navigation.
integration_issues.workaround: Cart works correctly when navigating through the UI flow, but direct URL access shows empty cart

passed_tests: Menu superior shows all required links: Marcas, Produtos, Serviços, Orçamento, Portfólio, Comunidade, Conhecimento, Consultor 3D, Contato
Portfolio page shows correct empty state 'Novos projetos em breve'
Portfolio page displays CTA button 'Iniciar meu projeto agora'
Checkout page structure exists with proper steps (Carrinho, Dados, Pagamento, Confirmação)
Mercado Pago integration is properly set up with test credentials
Mercado Pago badge and payment methods text visible in checkout
Customer data form fields present and functional (nome, email, cpf, cep)
Checkout shows proper empty cart state when no items present
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Cart context doesn't persist items when navigating directly to /checkout URL. Consider initializing cart context from localStorage on component mount to handle direct navigation scenarios.
